---
title: "DATA3888 Report"
author: "Finance Group 21"
date: "2026-05-03"
output: html_document
---

## Executive Summary

## Motivation

## EDA/Dataset (characteristics/limitation of data set)

## Feature engineering

## Candidates models

### Cluster level:

-   Transformer+LSTM
-   LightGBM
-   ARMA-GARCH + KNN
-   HAR-RV

### Stock level:

-   GNN
-   LightGBM

## Experimental evaluation

## Contribution

## Reference
